---
title: "Nasdaq Stocks Historical Quotes Dashboard"
---

Welcome to the Nasdaq Stock Quotes Dashboard! This site hosts historical stock datasets and interactive charts for prominent Nasdaq stocks.

Our datasets are fetched directly from Nasdaq's public endpoints and cleaned using Python and Pandas.

## Key Project Deliverables

*   [Interactive Charts](charts.qmd): Access high-fidelity interactive stock charting (candlestick & volume subplots) with dynamic time range selectors.
*   **Historical Datasets:** Pre-downloaded, cleaned historical CSV datasets (dating back 10 years) for top companies are located in the project workspace under the `downloads/` directory.

## Directory Structure

*   [code/](file:///workspaces/stocks/code/) — Python scraper and chart builder scripts.
*   `downloads/` — Cleaned stock price history CSVs (ignored by Git).
*   `plots/` — Rendered interactive Plotly stock charts (ignored by Git).
*   `plan.md` — Project milestone tracking and completed steps.

## Available Stock Datasets

We have pre-downloaded 10-year daily historical records for:

*   **AAPL** (Apple Inc.)
*   **MSFT** (Microsoft Corp.)
*   **GOOGL** (Alphabet Inc.)
*   **AMZN** (Amazon.com Inc.)
*   **NVDA** (NVIDIA Corp.)
*   **META** (Meta Platforms Inc.)
*   **TSLA** (Tesla Inc.)
*   **AVGO** (Broadcom Inc.)
*   **COST** (Costco Wholesale Corp.)
*   **NFLX** (Netflix Inc.)
*   **PEP** (PepsiCo Inc.)
